name: Sophia Document
description: Parses inbound document attachments with LlamaParse and appends bounded markdown context before prompt build.

baseUrl.label: LlamaParse Base URL
baseUrl.help: Defaults to the US SaaS endpoint. Override for regional endpoints if needed.

tier.label: LlamaParse Tier
tier.help: Parsing tier used for inbound documents.

version.label: Parse Version
version.help: Use "latest" unless you need to pin behavior.

pollIntervalMs.label: Poll Interval (ms)
pollIntervalMs.help: How often parse job status is polled.

pollTimeoutMs.label: Poll Timeout (ms)
pollTimeoutMs.help: Maximum polling duration before giving up.

maxChars.label: Max Injected Characters
maxChars.help: Upper bound for markdown injected into system context.
